nasb.text: Ever since I came to Pharaoh to speak in Your name, he has done harm to this people, and You have not delivered Your people at all.”

esv.text: For since I came to Pharaoh to speak in your name, he has done evil to this people, and you have not delivered your people at all.”

cnv.text: 自從我到法老那裡，奉你的名說話以來，他就苦待這人民，你一點也沒有拯救你自己的人民。”

ccb.text: 自从我去法老那里奉你的名发言后，他更加虐待你的子民，你并没有拯救他们。”
